programmes.show_description: Discover your new signature scent with Floral Street. Explore beauty favourites and fragrance must-haves to refresh your routine and uplift your mood.

Discover Dyson's innovative home solutions in this show, from fabulous vacuum cleaners to sleek bladeless fans. Upgrade your home and make life easier with their ground-breaking designs.
Discover your new signature scent with Floral Street. Explore beauty favourites and fragrance must-haves to refresh your routine and uplift your mood.
Wake up to QVC! We've chosen products from across all our ranges to ensure there is something for everyone to enjoy. Tune in to see special guests too.
Specialising in mature plants for instant impact, Plants2Gardens offer a huge array of vibrant, colourful blooms to help transform your outdoor space and bring your garden to life.
Find the best in health and fitness products to give you a spring in your step and a healthier lifestyle. From top tips and great gadgets, we'll help you to revitalise your daily routine.
Experience 1PM with Floral Street! Discover vibrant fragrances and scented gifts designed to uplift your mood and add a touch of luxury to your day.
Step out in style in Skechers! Renowned for their on-trend, sporty designs, you can now find their fab shoes at QVC too!
Get a sneak peak at the upcoming Fashion Day. This is your chance to find out more about the new trends we'll be presenting, and to get your hands on some of this season's must-haves.
Uncover the art of fragrance with Floral Street. Explore unique scent stories and find the perfect perfume to express your individuality and style.
Snap up a bargain from this selection of silver and gold jewellery, set with the world's finest simulated diamonds - all for under £30 (including VAT and P&P)!
We're bringing the high street's fashion destination to your sofa with Phase 8's extensive range of sophisticated, high quality designs for all occasions, in a variety of feminine prints and colours.
Discover Floral Street in our latest Beauty Cosmetics and Skincare show, a London-based fragrance brand inspired by young, urban British women, and famous for their contemporary floral fragrances.
Radley fashion accessories provide an aspirational mix of style, attention to detail and desirability, offering designs for every occasion that make you look and feel fabulous.
Bring your spring garden dreams to life! Discover inspiration, tips, and must-have finds to help your outdoor space bloom this season.
Uncover the art of fragrance with Floral Street. Explore unique scent stories and find the perfect perfume to express your individuality and style.
Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.
Transform your outdoor space with Spring Garden Refresh. Discover inspiring ideas and must-have products to help your garden bloom this season!

Spring Accessories with Pieces.

Pamper your hands and feet with innovative hand and footcare formulas from international podiatrist and foot expert Margaret Dabbs.
Spruce up your spring garden with a little help from QVC. Whether you're an avid gardener or novice, tune in for gorgeous plants and practical advice.
Create a warm and cosy sanctuary in your home, with the Cozee Home range of snuggly bedding, throws and accessories offering comfort and coziness in your home.
Awaken your senses with fragrance experts Molton Brown, London's bath, body and beauty connoisseurs since 1973. Indulge in exquisitely crafted blends brought to you by Molton Brown, London.
Rieker offers footwear designed to be flexible, roomy, light and well cushioned. Following trends in the marketplace, Rieker provides classic footwear to women of all ages.
Protecting your complexion is one of the most important parts of any skincare routine, so let Ultrasun's SPF formulas give you superior care, wherever life takes you.
The perfect blend of cosmetics and skincare, the bareMinerals range is ideal for women who are concerned about the additives, preservatives and fragrances routinely found in make-up.
Indulge yourself in our collection of fine, exquisite jewellery. Each piece in our glamorous selection epitomises the height of luxury. Go on, you deserve it!
